caption: Diagram 2 Participation of Institutions in the VNR Meeting of Indonesia 2021.74
description: A bar chart showing the frequency of meeting participation by institutions. The x-axis represents 'Meeting Participation Frequency' (1x to 24x) and the y-axis represents 'Number of Participating Institutions'. The highest bar is for 1x participation with 160 institutions.

caption: Diagram 3 Distribution of Participating Institutions within VNR Meeting of Indonesia 2021.75
description: A pie chart showing the distribution of participating institutions by category. Categories include Government (24%), Other State Institutions (7%), Civil Society Organizations (3%), Philanthropic Foundation (13%), Educational Institution (8%), Private and State-Owned Companies (37%), and Other Institutions (8%).
